values.fullName: Any broken bones or torn cartilage that impact your ability to carry out day to day tasks%3F
Any impairment with vision or hearing%3F
Arthritis%2C rheumatism or painful joints or other musculoskeletal pain%3F
Asthma%2C chronic bronchitis or other chest problems%3F
Auto Immune Disease or on immunosuppressant medication%3F
Eczema%2C dermatitis%2C hives or other skin rashes or complaints%3F
Epilepsy%2C dizzy%2Fgiddy%2Ffainting spells%2C blackouts or neurological disorder%3F
Have you ever been diagnosed with latex allergy%3F
Have you ever had difficulties wearing PPE including closed in shoes%3F
Have you ever sustained a work-related injury or illness%3F If so%2C how was it addressed%2C and what preventative measures have you taken since then%3F
Have you had a full medical clearance for any injury identified in these questions%3F
High blood pressure%2C chest pain or heart or circulatory trouble%3F
Hip%2C knee or ankle pain or strain %28including Sciatica%29%3F
Lower back%2C neck or thoracic spinal pain or strain %28including back surgery%29%3F
Mental health condition including severe anxiety%2C PTSD and%2For depression that may impact your abilities to carry out your professional tasks%3F
Nail infections%2C or chronic skin infections%3F
Scars%2Fdeformations which may restrict physical movement%3F
Shoulder or neck or arm%2Fwrist pain or strain%3F
Home Care %2F Hospital in the Home %28HITH%29
Safe Handling and Administration of Medicine
Suspected Physical and Mental Abuse awareness training
O %26 G - Obstetrics and gynaecological ultrasound
O %26 G - Reproductive endocrinology and infertility
No - No Longer Interested in UK
No - No Longer in the UK
No - Not as Expected by EP
No - Placed by Another Agency Contract

I have received the full dTpa vaccination %28Diphtheria%2C Tetanus %26 Pertussis%29
I%E2%80%99ve only been vaccinated for Pertussis %28Whooping Cough%29

Electronic Travel Authority %28Business Entrant%29 visa %28subclass 956 and 977%29
Foreign Affairs or Defence sector visa %28subclass 576%29
